---
title: "2 - drug vs metab native laptop"
output: html_document
date: "2025-08-22"
---

# Packages & Files

```{r}
library(arrow)
library(data.table)
library(tibble)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)

x <- arrow::read_parquet("~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/lincs_drug_gene_data_mean")
xmeta <- arrow::read_parquet("~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/lincs_drug_meta")

x <- data.frame(x, row.names = 1)

gmr_corr <- read.csv("~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/correlation gene and metab rectum adult updated 3-26-2026.csv")
pcorr_sex_gmr <- read.csv("~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/partial correlation gene and metab rectum cf sex adult updated 3-26-2026.csv")
pcorr_diag_gmr <- read.csv("~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/partial correlation gene and metab rectum cf diagnosis adult updated 3-26-2026.csv")
```

# RECTUM FULL & DRUGS

```{r}
gmr_corr_u <- gmr_corr |>
  dplyr::select(x, y, rho)

gmr_corr_u1 <- gmr_corr_u %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = y, values_from = rho)

gmr_corr_u2 <- column_to_rownames(gmr_corr_u1, var = "x")

#intersect with common row names which are GENES
common_genes <- intersect(rownames(x), rownames(gmr_corr_u2))
metab_rectum_common <- gmr_corr_u2[common_genes, ]
drugs_rectum_common <- x[common_genes, ]

#convert row names back to column
df_mr <- tibble::rownames_to_column(metab_rectum_common, "gene")
df_dr <- tibble::rownames_to_column(drugs_rectum_common, "gene")
```

## correlate

```{r}
# DRUG x METABOLITE SPEARMAN CORRELATION (genes as observations)

chunk_size <- 200
n_drugs <- ncol(drug_ranked)
chunks <- split(1:n_drugs, ceiling(seq_along(1:n_drugs) / chunk_size))

cat("Total chunks to process:", length(chunks), "\n")  # will be ~168 chunks

results_list <- list()

for (i in seq_along(chunks)) {
  cat("Processing chunk", i, "of", length(chunks), "\n")
  
  drug_chunk <- drug_ranked[, chunks[[i]], drop = FALSE]
  combined_chunk <- cbind(drug_chunk, metab_ranked)
  
  rc <- Hmisc::rcorr(combined_chunk, type = "pearson")
  
  n_chunk_drugs <- ncol(drug_chunk)
  n_metab <- ncol(metab_ranked)
  
  rho_mat <- rc$r[1:n_chunk_drugs, (n_chunk_drugs+1):(n_chunk_drugs+n_metab), drop = FALSE]
  p_mat   <- rc$P[1:n_chunk_drugs, (n_chunk_drugs+1):(n_chunk_drugs+n_metab), drop = FALSE]
  n_mat   <- rc$n[1:n_chunk_drugs, (n_chunk_drugs+1):(n_chunk_drugs+n_metab), drop = FALSE]
  
  rho_long <- as.data.frame(rho_mat) %>%
    mutate(x = rownames(rho_mat)) %>%
    pivot_longer(-x, names_to = "y", values_to = "rho")
  
  p_long <- as.data.frame(p_mat) %>%
    mutate(x = rownames(p_mat)) %>%
    pivot_longer(-x, names_to = "y", values_to = "p")
  
  n_long <- as.data.frame(n_mat) %>%
    mutate(x = rownames(n_mat)) %>%
    pivot_longer(-x, names_to = "y", values_to = "n")
  
  results_list[[i]] <- rho_long %>%
    left_join(p_long, by = c("x", "y")) %>%
    left_join(n_long, by = c("x", "y"))
  
  # clean up chunk objects each iteration
  rm(drug_chunk, combined_chunk, rc, rho_mat, p_mat, n_mat,
     rho_long, p_long, n_long)
  gc()
}

# --- Combine all chunks and calculate FDR ---
cat("Combining results...\n")
dmr_corr <- bind_rows(results_list) %>%
  mutate(message = ifelse(is.na(rho), "insufficient data", "ok")) %>%
  group_by(x) %>%
  mutate(q_x = p.adjust(p, method = "BH")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(y) %>%
  mutate(q_y = p.adjust(p, method = "BH")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(q = p.adjust(p, method = "BH")) %>%
  dplyr::select(x, y, rho, p, n, message, q_x, q_y, q)
```

## save corr file

```{r}
write_csv(dmr_corr, "~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/correlation drug and metab rectum full adult updated 3-26-2026.csv")
```

# RECTUM SEX & DRUGS

```{r}
pcorr_sex_gmr1 <- pcorr_sex_gmr |>
  dplyr::select(x, y, rho)

pcorr_sex_gmr2 <- pcorr_sex_gmr1 %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = y, values_from = rho)

pcorr_sex_gmr3 <- column_to_rownames(pcorr_sex_gmr2, var = "x")

#intersect with common row names which are GENES
common_genes <- intersect(rownames(x), rownames(pcorr_sex_gmr3))
metab_sr_common <- pcorr_sex_gmr3[common_genes, ]
drugs_sr_common <- x[common_genes, ]

#convert row names back to column
df_mrs <- tibble::rownames_to_column(metab_sr_common, "gene")
df_drs <- tibble::rownames_to_column(drugs_sr_common, "gene")
```

## correlate

```{r}
# --- 1. Extract numeric matrices ---
metab_mat_s <- as.matrix(df_mrs[, -1])
drug_mat_s  <- as.matrix(df_drs[, -1])

rownames(metab_mat_s) <- df_mrs$gene
rownames(drug_mat_s)  <- df_drs$gene

# --- 2. Rank-transform columns ---
metab_ranked_s <- apply(metab_mat_s, 2, rank)
drug_ranked_s  <- apply(drug_mat_s,  2, rank)

# NO residualization needed — your input rhos already control for sex

# --- 3. Chunked correlation ---
chunk_size <- 2000
n_drugs <- ncol(drug_ranked_s)
chunks <- split(1:n_drugs, ceiling(seq_along(1:n_drugs) / chunk_size))

cat("Total chunks to process:", length(chunks), "\n")

output_file_s <- "~/Documents/correlation drug and metab rectum sex partial RAW.csv"

write_csv(
  data.frame(x=character(), y=character(), rho=numeric(),
             p=numeric(), n=numeric(), message=character()),
  output_file_s
)

for (i in seq_along(chunks)) {
  cat("Processing chunk", i, "of", length(chunks), "\n")
  
  drug_chunk <- drug_ranked_s[, chunks[[i]], drop = FALSE]
  combined_chunk <- cbind(drug_chunk, metab_ranked_s)
  
  rc <- Hmisc::rcorr(combined_chunk, type = "pearson")
  
  n_chunk_drugs <- ncol(drug_chunk)
  n_metab <- ncol(metab_ranked_s)
  
  rho_mat <- rc$r[1:n_chunk_drugs, (n_chunk_drugs+1):(n_chunk_drugs+n_metab), drop = FALSE]
  p_mat   <- rc$P[1:n_chunk_drugs, (n_chunk_drugs+1):(n_chunk_drugs+n_metab), drop = FALSE]
  n_mat   <- rc$n[1:n_chunk_drugs, (n_chunk_drugs+1):(n_chunk_drugs+n_metab), drop = FALSE]
  
  chunk_result <- as.data.frame(rho_mat) %>%
    mutate(x = rownames(rho_mat)) %>%
    pivot_longer(-x, names_to = "y", values_to = "rho") %>%
    left_join(
      as.data.frame(p_mat) %>%
        mutate(x = rownames(p_mat)) %>%
        pivot_longer(-x, names_to = "y", values_to = "p"),
      by = c("x", "y")
    ) %>%
    left_join(
      as.data.frame(n_mat) %>%
        mutate(x = rownames(n_mat)) %>%
        pivot_longer(-x, names_to = "y", values_to = "n"),
      by = c("x", "y")
    ) %>%
    mutate(message = ifelse(is.na(rho), "insufficient data", "ok"))
  
  write_csv(chunk_result, output_file_s, append = TRUE)
  
  rm(drug_chunk, combined_chunk, rc, rho_mat, p_mat, n_mat, chunk_result)
}

# --- FDR ---
cat("Calculating FDR...\n")
dmrs_corr <- read_csv(output_file_s) %>%
  group_by(x) %>%
  mutate(q_x = p.adjust(p, method = "BH")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(y) %>%
  mutate(q_y = p.adjust(p, method = "BH")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(q = p.adjust(p, method = "BH")) %>%
  dplyr::select(x, y, rho, p, n, message, q_x, q_y, q)
```

## save corr file (sex)

```{r}
write_csv(dmrs_corr, "~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/correlation drug and metab rectum cf sex adult updated 3-26-2026.csv")
#C18n_TF6 = NA's (since df_mis had all NAs because the original genes data were all zero)
```

# RECTUM DIAGNOSIS & DRUGS

```{r}
pcorr_diag_gmr1 <- pcorr_diag_gmr |>
  dplyr::select(x, y, rho)

pcorr_diag_gmr2 <- pcorr_diag_gmr1 %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = y, values_from = rho)

pcorr_diag_gmr3 <- column_to_rownames(pcorr_diag_gmr2, var = "x")

#intersect with common row names which are GENES
common_genes <- intersect(rownames(x), rownames(pcorr_diag_gmr3))
metab_dr_common <- pcorr_diag_gmr3[common_genes, ]
drugs_dr_common <- x[common_genes, ]

#convert row names back to column
df_mrd <- tibble::rownames_to_column(metab_dr_common, "gene")
df_drd <- tibble::rownames_to_column(drugs_dr_common, "gene")
```

## correlate

```{r}
drug_mat_d  <- as.matrix(df_drd[, -1])
metab_mat_d <- as.matrix(df_mrd[, -1])

rownames(drug_mat_d)  <- df_drd$gene
rownames(metab_mat_d) <- df_mrd$gene

#sum(is.na(drug_mat_d))
#sum(is.na(metab_mat_d))

# --- 2. Rank-transform columns ---
metab_ranked_d <- apply(metab_mat_d, 2, rank)
drug_ranked_d  <- apply(drug_mat_d,  2, rank)

# NO residualization needed — your input rhos already control for diagnosis

# --- 3. Chunked correlation ---
chunk_size <- 2000
n_drugs <- ncol(drug_ranked_d)
chunks <- split(1:n_drugs, ceiling(seq_along(1:n_drugs) / chunk_size))

cat("Total chunks to process:", length(chunks), "\n")

output_file_d <- "~/Documents/correlation drug and metab rectum diagnosis partial RAW.csv"

write_csv(
  data.frame(x=character(), y=character(), rho=numeric(),
             p=numeric(), n=numeric(), message=character()),
  output_file_d
)

for (i in seq_along(chunks)) {
  cat("Processing chunk", i, "of", length(chunks), "\n")
  
  drug_chunk <- drug_ranked_d[, chunks[[i]], drop = FALSE]
  combined_chunk <- cbind(drug_chunk, metab_ranked_d)
  
  rc <- Hmisc::rcorr(combined_chunk, type = "pearson")
  
  n_chunk_drugs <- ncol(drug_chunk)
  n_metab <- ncol(metab_ranked_d)
  
  rho_mat <- rc$r[1:n_chunk_drugs, (n_chunk_drugs+1):(n_chunk_drugs+n_metab), drop = FALSE]
  p_mat   <- rc$P[1:n_chunk_drugs, (n_chunk_drugs+1):(n_chunk_drugs+n_metab), drop = FALSE]
  n_mat   <- rc$n[1:n_chunk_drugs, (n_chunk_drugs+1):(n_chunk_drugs+n_metab), drop = FALSE]
  
  chunk_result <- as.data.frame(rho_mat) %>%
    mutate(x = rownames(rho_mat)) %>%
    pivot_longer(-x, names_to = "y", values_to = "rho") %>%
    left_join(
      as.data.frame(p_mat) %>%
        mutate(x = rownames(p_mat)) %>%
        pivot_longer(-x, names_to = "y", values_to = "p"),
      by = c("x", "y")
    ) %>%
    left_join(
      as.data.frame(n_mat) %>%
        mutate(x = rownames(n_mat)) %>%
        pivot_longer(-x, names_to = "y", values_to = "n"),
      by = c("x", "y")
    ) %>%
    mutate(message = ifelse(is.na(rho), "insufficient data", "ok"))
  
  write_csv(chunk_result, output_file_d, append = TRUE)
  
  rm(drug_chunk, combined_chunk, rc, rho_mat, p_mat, n_mat, chunk_result)
}

# --- FDR ---
cat("Calculating FDR...\n")
dmrd_corr <- read_csv(output_file_d) %>%
  group_by(x) %>%
  mutate(q_x = p.adjust(p, method = "BH")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(y) %>%
  mutate(q_y = p.adjust(p, method = "BH")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(q = p.adjust(p, method = "BH")) %>%
  dplyr::select(x, y, rho, p, n, message, q_x, q_y, q)
```

## save corr file (diagnosis) 

```{r}
write_csv(dmrd_corr, "~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/correlation drug and metab rectum cf diagnosis adult updated 3-26-2026.csv")
```
